name: RE:COVER
subtitle: BPC 157
description: BPC 157 — Joint recovery and gut protection compound studied for tissue regeneration and resilience.
details: Body Protection Compound 157 is a 15-amino acid peptide derived from human gastric juice. Extensively studied for its role in tissue protection, gut lining repair, and systemic recovery in research models.

name: RE:PAIR
subtitle: TB 500
description: TB 500 — Thymosin Beta-4 for muscle, tendon, and ligament repair research.
details: Synthetic version of a naturally occurring 43-amino acid peptide that plays a crucial role in actin regulation, cell migration, and tissue regeneration. Studied extensively in recovery and healing research.
benefits: Faster Recovery from Injury or Strain
New Blood Vessel and Tissue Growth

name: RE:BUILD
subtitle: TB 500 + BPC 157
description: TB 500 + BPC 157 combo — the ultimate recovery stack for advanced tissue repair research.
details: A powerful research combination of TB-500 (Thymosin Beta-4) and BPC-157. Together these compounds are studied for synergistic effects on muscle, tendon, ligament repair, and systemic tissue regeneration.
benefits: Faster Recovery from Injury and Strain

name: RE:ZEMPIC
subtitle: Semaglutide
description: Semaglutide — GLP-1 receptor agonist for metabolic and appetite regulation research.
details: Synthetic analogue of the human glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1). Used extensively in metabolic, appetite regulation, and insulin sensitivity studies.

name: RE:ZEPATIDE
subtitle: Tirzepatide
description: Tirzepatide — Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist for advanced metabolic research.
details: Novel synthetic peptide that activates both GIP and GLP-1 receptors simultaneously. A cutting-edge tool for metabolic, diabetes, and obesity research.

name: RE:TATRUTIDE
subtitle: Retatrutide
description: Retatrutide — Triple receptor agonist (GIP/GLP-1/Glucagon) for advanced metabolic research.
details: Next-generation synthetic peptide activating GIP, GLP-1, and glucagon receptors. Among the most potent research tools for studying metabolic regulation, appetite control, and energy expenditure.

name: RE:SHAPE
subtitle: Tesamorelin
description: Tesamorelin — GHRH analogue for body composition and growth hormone research.
details: Synthetic analogue of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH). Studied for its effects on growth hormone secretion, body composition, and metabolic health in research settings.
benefits: Reduction of Visceral and Abdominal Fat

name: RE:TALIATE
subtitle: MOTS-c
description: MOTS-c — Mitochondrial-derived peptide for cellular energy and performance research.
details: 16-amino acid peptide encoded within the mitochondrial genome. Regulates metabolic homeostasis, cellular energy sensing, and mitochondrial function in research models.

name: RE:GLOW
subtitle: GHK-Cu
description: GHK-Cu — Copper peptide for skin regeneration, wound healing, and longevity research.
details: Glycyl-L-histidyl-L-lysine copper complex. A naturally occurring tripeptide-copper complex studied extensively for its role in collagen synthesis, wound healing, and cellular regeneration.

name: PLATINUM MELANOTAN II
subtitle: Melanotan II — U.P.A
description: Melanotan II — Melanocyte-stimulating hormone analogue for tanning and pigmentation research.
details: Synthetic analogue of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH). Studied extensively for its role in melanogenesis, UV-independent skin pigmentation, and appetite modulation. Kit includes 10mg MTII vial and 2ml bacteriostatic water.

name: BRONZEUP MELANOTAN II
subtitle: MT-II Nasal Spray — Healthy D Labs
description: BronzeUp — Melanotan II nasal spray for needle-free tanning peptide research.
details: Healthy D Labs BronzeUp delivers 10mg of Melanotan II (alpha-melanocyte stimulating hormone) in a 15ml nasal spray format. Studied for melanogenesis, UV-independent pigmentation, and skin tanning research without subcutaneous injection.

name: NAD+
subtitle: Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide — Healthy U Nutrition
description: NAD+ 500mg — Optimal cellular health solution for longevity and energy metabolism research.
details: Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide is a critical coenzyme found in all living cells. Studied extensively for its role in cellular energy production, DNA repair, sirtuin activation, and mitochondrial function. Kit includes 500mg/5ml vial and bacteriostatic water.
benefits: Cellular Energy Production and ATP Synthesis

name: PLATINUM BPC-157
subtitle: BPC 157 — U.P.A
description: Platinum BPC-157 — 5mg regenerative pentadecapeptide kit for tissue healing and recovery research.
details: U.P.A Platinum BPC-157 provides 5mg of Body Protection Compound 157, a 15-amino acid peptide derived from human gastric juice. Includes 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for gut lining repair, tendon healing, and systemic tissue regeneration.

name: PLATINUM CJC-1295
subtitle: CJC-1295 with DAC — U.P.A
description: CJC-1295 with DAC — Long-acting GHRH analogue for growth hormone release and body composition research.
details: U.P.A Platinum CJC-1295 with Drug Affinity Complex (DAC) is a modified GHRH analogue with an extended half-life. 2mg multi-dose vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for sustained GH secretion, muscle growth, and fat metabolism.

name: PLATINUM IPAMORELIN
subtitle: Ipamorelin — U.P.A
description: Ipamorelin — Selective growth hormone secretagogue for GH pulse and recovery research.
details: U.P.A Platinum Ipamorelin is a 5-amino acid pentapeptide and selective GH secretagogue. 5mg vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for clean GH release without significant cortisol or prolactin elevation, making it a precise research tool.
benefits: Minimal Side Effect Profile in Research

name: PLATINUM PT-141
subtitle: Bremelanotide — U.P.A
description: PT-141 — Melanocortin receptor agonist for sexual function and libido research.
details: U.P.A Platinum PT-141 (Bremelanotide) is a synthetic melanocortin analogue derived from Melanotan II. 10mg vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for its central nervous system action on sexual arousal and libido modulation in research models.
benefits: Male and Female Sexual Function Studies

name: PLATINUM HCG 5000 IU
subtitle: Human Chorionic Gonadotropin — U.P.A
description: HCG 5000 IU — Gonadotropin hormone for testosterone, fertility, and hormonal regulation research.
details: U.P.A Platinum HCG provides 5000 International Units of Human Chorionic Gonadotropin with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for its role in testosterone production stimulation, testicular function, and fertility regulation in research models.

name: PLATINUM IGF-1 LR3
subtitle: Insulin-Like Growth Factor Long R3 — U.P.A
description: IGF-1 LR3 — Long-acting insulin-like growth factor for muscle growth and cellular regeneration research.
details: U.P.A Platinum IGF-1 LR3 is a recombinant analogue of Insulin-Like Growth Factor 1 with an extended half-life. 100mcg multi-dose vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for anabolic signalling, muscle satellite cell activation, and cellular hyperplasia.

name: PLATINUM PEG MGF
subtitle: PEGylated Mechano Growth Factor — U.P.A
description: PEG MGF — PEGylated Mechano Growth Factor for muscle repair, hypertrophy, and satellite cell research.
details: U.P.A Platinum PEG MGF is a pegylated form of Mechano Growth Factor, an IGF-1 splice variant. 5000mcg lyophilised vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. PEGylation extends half-life significantly. Studied for muscle fibre repair, satellite cell activation, and hypertrophy signalling.

name: PLATINUM GHRP-6
subtitle: Growth Hormone Releasing Peptide-6 — U.P.A
description: GHRP-6 — Hexapeptide growth hormone secretagogue for GH pulse amplification and appetite research.
details: U.P.A Platinum GHRP-6 is a synthetic hexapeptide that stimulates GH release by acting on ghrelin receptors. 5mg vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for strong GH pulse amplification, appetite stimulation, and anabolic signalling in research models.

name: PLATINUM HGH FRAG 176-191
subtitle: HGH Fragment 176-191 — U.P.A
description: HGH Frag 176-191 — Truncated GH fragment for lipolysis and fat metabolism research.
details: U.P.A Platinum HGH Fragment 176-191 is a stabilised analogue of the C-terminal fragment of human growth hormone. 2mg vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for selective lipolytic activity without the growth-promoting effects of full-length GH.
benefits: No Impact on Blood Glucose or IGF-1

name: PLATINUM TB500
subtitle: Thymosin Beta-4 — U.P.A
description: TB500 — Thymosin Beta-4 for muscle, tendon, and ligament repair and recovery research.
details: U.P.A Platinum TB500 provides 5mg of Thymosin Beta-4, a 43-amino acid peptide with key roles in actin regulation and cell migration. 5mg vial with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Studied for tissue regeneration, inflammation reduction, and wound healing.
